title: cyrtandra sandwicensis
intro: Cyrtandra sandwicensis, also known as Ma'o, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful for treating various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Cyrtandra sandwicensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and aid in the treatment of coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Cyrtandra sandwicensis can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by applying the leaves topically to affected areas.
